mapper.select: SELECT A.USERID , A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO , B.NAME FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A INNER JOIN MCP_USER B ON A.USERID = B.USERID WHERE 1=1 AND A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(B.NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))
SELECT USERID , MOBILE_NO , NAME FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND MOBILE_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))

SELECT SUM(SHARE_CNT) AS SHARE_CNT FROM MCP_SHARE_PROMOTION WHERE 1=1
AND PROMOTION_CODE = #{promotionCode} GROUP BY PROMOTION_CODE

SELECT EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ ,BENEFIT_MOD_TYPE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE FROM ( SELECT T1.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ , 'A' AS BENEFIT_MOD_TYPE , PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_DATE FROM MCP_EVENT_BENEFIT_BAS T1 , MCP_EVENT_BENEFIT_RELATION T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ = T2.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ AND T2.NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq} AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH') || '000000' BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION SELECT T1.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ , 'B' AS BENEFIT_MOD_TYPE , PSTNG_START_SEC_DATE AS PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_SEC_DATE AS PSTNG_END_DATE FROM MCP_EVENT_BENEFIT_BAS T1 , MCP_EVENT_BENEFIT_RELATION T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ = T2.EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ AND T2.NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq} AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH') || '000000' BETWEEN PSTNG_START_SEC_DATE AND PSTNG_END_SEC_DATE AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM =1

SELECT EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ , DTL_SEQ , BENEFIT_MOD_TYPE , BENEFIT_DTL_IMG_NM , BENEFIT_DTL_NM , BENEFIT_DTL_DESC , SORT_KEY , CRET_IP , CRET_DT , CRET_ID , AMD_IP , AMD_DT , AMD_ID FROM MCP_EVENT_BENEFIT_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND EVENT_BENEFIT_SEQ = #{eventBenefitSeq} AND BENEFIT_MOD_TYPE = #{benefitModType} ORDER BY SORT_KEY
